page.title: All Components
page.subtitle: Every primitive, form field, layout, widget, and skeleton in one scrollable QA surface.

primitives.label: Primitives
primitives.title: Primitives
primitives.desc: Buttons, badges, cards, dialogs, dropdowns, avatars, tabs, tooltips, accordion, popover, sheet, command, breadcrumbs, separator, calendar, icon-wrapper, text-gradient, stat-card.

form-fields.label: Form Fields
form-fields.title: Form Fields
form-fields.desc: Every input/select/checkbox/radio/switch/slider variant wired into a single react-hook-form + zod-validated form.

form-layouts.label: Form Layouts
form-layouts.title: Form Layouts
form-layouts.desc: The four config-selectable form layouts: Grid, Tabs, Sectioned, Split.

dynamic-list.label: Dynamic List
dynamic-list.title: Dynamic List
dynamic-list.desc: DynamicListField — the add/remove/edit row editor for line-items inside a form.

crud-views.label: CRUD Views
crud-views.title: CRUD Views
crud-views.desc: The config-driven list as a data table OR a generic card grid, toggled live — both views come free from an entity's config.

data-display.label: Data Display
data-display.title: Data Display
data-display.desc: Avatar, Badge, EnumBadge, StatCard, table primitive, DashboardCard.

data-table.label: Data Table
data-table.title: Data Table
data-table.desc: The data table — 10 mock orders with every column-type renderer exercised.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.desc: Alert variants, Spinner, LoadingState, ConfirmDialog, Sheet drawers, FilterDrawer, Skeleton, ErrorBoundary demo.

layout.label: Layout
layout.title: Layout
layout.desc: PageHeader variants — badge, actions, breadcrumbs — plus a fenced Sidebar/Header preview.

application.label: Application
application.title: Application
application.desc: ImageUploader, FileUploader, file preview, image crop dialog, FilterMultiSelectField.

widgets.label: Widgets
widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.desc: WidgetRenderer — one example per category (kpi / chart / table / alert / map placeholder).

map-tracking.label: Maps & Tracking
map-tracking.title: Maps, coordinates & tracking
map-tracking.desc: The geo stack — the coordinates/boundary field, the map widget, and live vehicle tracking — previewed inline.

map.provider_hint: The same map, two providers — switch freely.
map.google_needs_key: Google Maps needs an API key (NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY). The free OpenStreetMap provider renders with no key at all.
map.boundary_body: Drop a point or draw a polygon on the map; the geometry is stored on the entity. Used by the Example UI entity.
map.tracking_body: Vehicles stream their position over the live socket, so markers move in real time on the operations map — no page reload.
